cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 國外 基地 · 秘密結社
cover.subtitle:
국경 너머에 학교를 세우고,
안에서는 비밀로 모였다.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, 1910s. ONE Korean independence activist (Yi Hoeyeong reference) — long padded gray Manchurian-style robe, fur cap, holding a folded land deed and a small book, walking through a snow-dusted Manchurian plain (서간도 reference). Behind him in the misty distance: a small log schoolhouse with a single chimney smoke (신흥무관학교 reference). Color: dark blue-gray + sepia + faint warm amber from the chimney + cold white snow. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 박상진
items.desc: 대구 본부, 친일 부호 처단 활동.

outro.tip_headline:
"서간도 신흥 · 북간도 중광"
지역–단체 매칭 필수.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 지역(서간도/북간도/연해주/상하이/미주)과 단체·학교·군대 매칭, 독립의군부(복벽주의)와 대한광복회(공화주의)의 이념 차이, 신민회 해체(1911 105인 사건) 후 인맥 흐름이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small log cabin silhouette suggesting Sinheung Mugwan School. RIGHT: a small folded newspaper suggesting Gwoneop Sinmun. Cream #F2EDE3 base + dark blue-gray #2E3A4A accent + sepia line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
